request.description:
\- \`fullName\`: required, string, min 2, max 100

\- \`phone\`: optional, string- \`email\`: required, valid email

\- \`category\`: optional, string, min 2, max 100

\- \`address\`: required, string, min 2, max 255

\- \`password\`: required, string, min 5, max 128
